examples.title: Basic File Writing with ofstream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a file for writing and write data to it
examples.explanation: Creates ofstream object with filename, checks for errors using ! operator, writes using << operator, closes file to flush buffer and release resources.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) - linear in number of write operations

examples.title: Basic File Reading with ifstream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a file for reading and read data from it
examples.explanation: Uses ifstream to open file, is_open() to verify, getline() to read lines until EOF, closes file properly.
examples.spaceComplexity: O(1) - reads one line at a time

examples.title: File Opening with Explicit Mode
examples.description: Demonstrates using explicit file opening modes
examples.explanation: Shows opening with ios::app for appending and ios::binary for binary operations. Uses fail() for error checking.
examples.timeComplexity: O(1) for open, O(k) for write operations

examples.title: Read-Write with fstream
examples.description: Demonstrates using fstream for both reading and writing
examples.explanation: fstream requires explicit ios::in | ios::out. After writing, clear() resets EOF flag before seeking. seekg() positions read pointer.
